question: List Powels et al's original publication
final_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Author" = 'Powels et al' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication'
decomposed_queries: Which trials have Author = 'Powels et al'?
Which trials have Originial publication or Follow-up = 'Original publication'?

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Which trials have Originial publication or Follow-up = 'Original publication'?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Trials with Originial publication or Follow-up Original publication
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';
